summary: Jumbotron Output page for basketball games tested successfully. All features working as expected - page loads at /jumbotron/:shareCode, displays team info, scores, clock, timeouts, fouls, bonus status, and on-floor player stats. Jumbotron buttons work in both Classic and Advanced LiveGame pages.
seed_data_creation: Used existing games: test-advanced-game-001 (Advanced Mode with share_code: advtest01), 2d43db80-dc75-4b8c-a1c6-b1cc4115c97e (Classic Mode with share_code: 5718741c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jumbotron feature is fully functional. The /jumbotron/:shareCode route displays a full-screen presentation view for basketball games. Jumbotron buttons are available in both Classic LiveGame (header toolbar) and Advanced LiveGame (Export tab).

jumbotron_page_route.description: Page loads at /jumbotron/:shareCode route without authentication

tests: Team logos displayed (placeholder 'A' when no logo set)
Team names displayed (Advanced Home, Advanced Away)
Team colors displayed (red for home, blue for away)
LIVE indicator displayed (red dot with 'LIVE' text)
Team Fouls displayed (0 for both teams)
Stats table headers: #, PLAYER, PTS, FG, FT, REB, A, PF
Player stats calculated correctly (PTS, FG made-att, FT made-att, REB, AST, PF)
Full-screen layout with two team panels
Clicking opens jumbotron page in new tab
Clicking opens jumbotron page in new tab

jumbotron_page_elements_verified.header: StatMoose logo, clock time, quarter indicator, LIVE indicator
jumbotron_page_elements_verified.home_panel: Logo, team name, score, team color, timeout dots, team fouls, bonus status, player stats table
jumbotron_page_elements_verified.away_panel: Logo, team name, score, team color, timeout dots, team fouls, bonus status, player stats table
jumbotron_page_elements_verified.footer: Score summary (Team Name: Score | Team Name: Score)

notes: Jumbotron page is public (no authentication required)
Uses the same /api/games/share/{share_code} endpoint as LiveView
Auto-refresh interval is 2 seconds for live updates
Player stats table shows only on-floor players (5 per team max)
